task_completion.description: Log into the SEB Server using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser window showing the SEB Server dashboard at localhost:8080, indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile or dashboard elements visible).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the exam import section and select the 'Testing' assessment tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server interface showing the 'Import Exam' or equivalent page with the 'Testing' assessment tool (Mock LMS) selected from a dropdown or list.

task_completion.description: Import an exam from the Testing assessment tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating an exam was imported, or the imported exam appearing in the SEB Server's exam list.

task_completion.description: Configure the imported exam with a name and a description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exam configuration/edit page showing text entered into the 'Name' and 'Description' input fields.

task_completion.description: Add a monitoring indicator to the exam.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The monitoring indicator configuration modal or section is open within the exam settings.

task_completion.description: Configure the indicator as 'Last Ping Time' named 'Network Latency' and save all changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The indicator list or saved exam configuration screen showing an indicator named 'Network Latency' with the type 'Last Ping Time'. A 'Saved' confirmation message or the updated exam details page should be visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the SEB Server web GUI to perform the task, not terminal commands or database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: All actions take place within a web browser. There should be no terminal windows open showing SQL commands, curl requests, or Docker exec commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual SEB Server application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows localhost:8080 and the SEB Server interface is fully rendered with standard styling, not a local text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use API testing tools to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of tools like Postman, Insomnia, or similar API clients in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed on SEB (Safe Exam Browser) Server. The assessment tool to import from is named 'Testing'. The monitoring indicator must specifically be named 'Network Latency' and its type must be selected as 'Last Ping Time'. Look for these exact strings in the SEB Server web interface to verify correctness.
